565 CHMTHRPY_INTRVNS_ADMSN_CD CHMTHRPY_INTRVNS_ADMSN_CD Treatment: Chemo - IV (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was receiving IV chemotherapy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
